raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es ne fuhtiju tohs Pra-
weeschus/ un tomehr tee tezzeja/
es ne runnaju / un tomehr tee
fluddtnaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet buhtu tee eekſch man-
na Padohma stahwejschi / tad
buhtu tee mannu Wahrdü man-
neem Laudim ſinnamu darri-
schi/ un buhtu tohs nogreesutchi
no winno fauna Zetta/ un no
winno taunnahu Darrifchanahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi es ejmu weens
Deews kas tuwu irr? tafka tas
KUNGS: Un neggi weens
Deews/ kas tahfu irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Warr arridsan kas tab-
ban apflehptäs Weetâs twer-
tees/ ka es to ne redsetu ? fakka
tas KUNGS: Neggi es to
Debbefi/ un to Semmi peepilu ?
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es ejmu to dsirdejs/ ko
tee Praweetchi fakka/ kas eekſch
mannu Wahrdä Mellus fluddi-
na / un fakka : Es ejmu Sapni
redsejs/ es ejmu Sapni redsejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zik tlgi tas buhs eekſch to
Praweefchu Sirdi/ kas Mellus
fluddina ? un fluddina ſawas
Sirds Wiltibu/ un irr firdswil-
tigi Praweefchi no Sirdsdib-
bina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas uhs to dohdahs / ka
manneem Laudim buhs mannu
Wahrdü aismirst zaur winnu
Sapneem/ ko iſweens ſawam
Tuwakam stahsta/ ka winnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid tas Praweets/ kas
Sapnus reds/ Sapnus stahsta/
un pee ka mans Wahrdä irr/
tas laid mannu Wahrdü pateefi
runna. Kas irr tahm Pellum
ar Labbibu jadarra? tafka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Woj mans Wahrdä ne
irr ta ka llaguns? fakka tas
KUNGS: Un ka weens Wee-
fers/ kas Akmira-Kalnus fa-
grausch ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht reds/ Es zelschohs
prett teem Praweefcheem/ fakka
tas KUNGS: Kas mannuß
Wahrdus ſohg/ ikweens no fa-
wa Tuwaka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ Es zelschohs prett
teem Praweefcheem/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Kas jawus patthus
Wahrdus runna / un fakka:
wiꞥſch irr to runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ Es zelschohs prett
teem / kas nepateetus Sapnus
fluddina/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Un stahsta tohs/ un peewilt man-
nus Laudis ar jaweem Melleem/
un ar jawahm schiglahm Bleh-
ahm/ kur es tomehr tohs ne ef-
mu fuhtijs/ un teem nenceka pa-
wehlejs/ un fcheem Laudim wiſſat
leeti ne derr/ fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu ſchee Laudis/jeb
kahds Praweets/ jeb Preesteris
tew waizahs/ un fazzihs : Kurra
irr ta KUNGA Nasta? Tad
buhs tew uhs teem fazziht :
(Jautajeet juhs) kas ta Nasta
irr?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
